accepted_classes.summary: Evidence-backed structural or routing friction worth preserving as shared workspace evidence.
preserve_when: the finding has a repo-relative path or explicit refs
the finding would reduce rediscovery if it survived the current setup pass
transient_when: the finding has no grounding path or refs
the finding only restates report output already present elsewhere

accepted_classes.summary: A bounded follow-on or handoff candidate worth preserving as explicit planning promotion guidance.
preserve_when: the finding includes a bounded next_action
the finding would still matter after the current session or agent ends
transient_when: the finding lacks a bounded next_action
the finding is only generic analysis with no clear planning owner

secondary: Do not build a workspace-owned analyzer.
Do not auto-write planning or memory state from setup input.
Do not preserve findings that have no durable owner or bounded next action.
